proposed_hypotheses.text: Receipt of treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (mean PFS higher in treatment_pembrolizumab=1).
Receipt of treatment_sotorasib is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (mean PFS higher in treatment_sotorasib=1).
Receipt of treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (mean PFS higher in treatment_olaparib=1).
Receipt of treatment_osimertinib is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (mean PFS higher in treatment_osimertinib=1).

analyses.result_summary: Welch t-test: mean pfs_months = 3.414 on pembrolizumab vs 3.449 off (n=25008 vs 24992). Difference = -0.035 months, p=0.0811. No significant overall effect.
Welch t-test: mean pfs_months = 3.641 on sotorasib vs 3.319 off (n=17544 vs 32456). Difference = +0.322 months, p=5.62e-49. Highly significant overall benefit.
Welch t-test: mean pfs_months = 3.414 on olaparib vs 3.439 off. Difference = -0.025 months, p=0.256. No significant overall effect.
Welch t-test: mean pfs_months = 3.434 on osimertinib vs 3.431 off. Difference = 0.004 months, p=0.87. No significant overall effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
stage_iv=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than stage_iv=0 (negative beta).
has_brain_mets=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than has_brain_mets=0 (negative beta).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive beta).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Greater age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive beta).
sex_female=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than sex_female=0 (negative beta).
Squamous histology (histology=='squamous') is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-squamous (negative beta).
Smoking status: current smokers have shorter pfs_months than non-current smokers (negative beta on smk_current).
Smoking status: never smokers have longer pfs_months than ever smokers (positive beta on smk_never).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps: beta=-1.099 months/unit, p=0. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ stage_iv: beta=-1.438, p=0. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ has_brain_mets: beta=-0.921, p=0. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ albumin_g_dl: beta=0.441, p=2.8e-109. Strongly positive.
OLS pfs_months ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo: beta=-0.073, p=7.48e-179. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ ldh_u_l: beta=-0.00051 months per U/L, p=3.55e-05. Negative as expected.
OLS pfs_months ~ age_years: beta=0.1699 months/yr, p=0. Positive (older patients have longer PFS).
OLS pfs_months ~ sex_female: beta=-0.204, p=2.41e-24. Negative (females have shorter PFS).
OLS pfs_months ~ I(histology=='squamous'): beta=-0.857, p=0. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ I(smoking_status=='current'): beta=-0.634, p=1.53e-187. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ I(smoking_status=='never'): beta=0.286, p=2.03e-24. Positive.

proposed_hypotheses.text: kras_g12c=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than kras_g12c=0 (positive univariate beta).
alk_fusion=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than alk_fusion=0 (negative univariate beta).
egfr_mutation=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than egfr_mutation=0 (positive univariate beta).
tmb_high=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than tmb_high=0 (negative univariate beta).
stk11_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than stk11_mutation=0 (negative univariate beta).
brca2_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0 (negative univariate beta).
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with longer pfs_months (positive univariate beta).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ kras_g12c: beta=0.782, p=4.79e-151. Strongly positive (KRAS G12C+ patients have longer PFS).
OLS pfs_months ~ alk_fusion: beta=-0.810, p=2.89e-69. Strongly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ egfr_mutation: beta=0.189, p=1.91e-10. Modestly positive.

OLS pfs_months ~ tmb_high: beta=-0.190, p=9.09e-18. Negative (TMB-high patients have slightly SHORTER PFS in this cohort, opposite of typical IO biology and likely reflects confounding by stage/aggressiveness).
OLS pfs_months ~ stk11_mutation: beta=0.0091, p=0.746. NOT significant univariately — STK11 effect is essentially null marginally, contradicting hypothesis.
OLS pfs_months ~ brca2_mutation: beta=-0.119, p=0.0413. Marginally negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ pdl1_tps: beta=0.0667 per unit (TPS on 0-1 scale), p=0.157. NOT significant univariately, contradicting expectation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for clinical features and biomarkers in a multivariable OLS model, treatment_sotorasib retains a positive association with pfs_months while treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_olaparib, and treatment_osimertinib remain near-null on average.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS pfs_months ~ all clinical+biomarker features + 4 treatments. treatment_pembrolizumab beta=-0.0056 (p=0.39); treatment_sotorasib beta=0.323 (p=0); treatment_olaparib beta=0.0024 (p=0.737); treatment_osimertinib beta=0.0011 (p=0.876). Sotorasib remains the only treatment with a positive adjusted main effect; the others are essentially null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab; this effect is larger than in patients with pdl1_tps<0.5 (positive treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_tps interaction).

Among patients with tmb_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab compared with tmb_high=0 (positive treatment_pembrolizumab × tmb_high interaction).

Among patients with stk11_mutation=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with shorter pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab compared with stk11_mutation=0 (negative treatment_pembrolizumab × stk11_mutation interaction).

Among never-smokers (smoking_status=='never'), treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with shorter pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab compared with ever-smokers (negative interaction with smk_never).
Among patients with squamous histology, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab compared with non-squamous (positive interaction with hist_sq).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_tps. Interaction coefficient = -0.116, p=0.217. Stratified: among pdl1_tps>=0.5 (n=10749), pembro effect = -0.070 months; among pdl1_tps<0.5 (n=39251), pembro effect = -0.025. Interaction is NOT statistically significant and points the wrong direction.
OLS interaction treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high: beta=-0.0179, p=0.685. Not significant.
OLS interaction treatment_pembrolizumab * stk11_mutation: beta=-0.0162, p=0.773. Not significant.
OLS interaction treatment_pembrolizumab * smk_never: beta=0.0317, p=0.571. Not significant.
OLS interaction treatment_pembrolizumab * hist_sq: beta=-0.0605, p=0.169. Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with kras_g12c=1, treatment_sotorasib is associated with longer pfs_months than no sotorasib; this effect is much larger than in kras_g12c=0 patients (positive treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c interaction).

Among kras_g12c=1 patients, those with stk11_mutation=1 derive a smaller treatment_sotorasib benefit than those with stk11_mutation=0 (negative treatment_sotorasib × stk11_mutation interaction within kras_g12c=1).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c. Interaction beta = 2.558, p=0. Stratified: in kras_g12c=1 patients pembro... I mean sotorasib effect = +2.55 months; in kras_g12c=0 effect = -0.0054. Massive positive interaction confirmed.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * stk11_mutation in kras_g12c=1 subset: interaction beta = -0.261, p=0.194. Negative direction but not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib; this effect is larger than in brca2_mutation=0 (positive treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation. Interaction beta = 0.037, p=0.778. Stratified: brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519), olaparib effect = 0.0104 months; brca2_mutation=0 (n=48481), effect = -0.0263. No meaningful enrichment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib is associated with longer pfs_months than no osimertinib; effect is larger than in egfr_mutation=0 (positive treatment_osimertinib × egfr_mutation interaction).

Among patients with alk_fusion=1, treatment_osimertinib is associated with longer pfs_months than no osimertinib; effect is larger than in alk_fusion=0 (positive treatment_osimertinib × alk_fusion interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation: interaction beta = -0.0199, p=0.758. Stratified: egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517) osimertinib effect = -0.0141; egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483) effect = 0.0058. NO benefit in EGFR+ subgroup, contradicting expectation.

OLS treatment_osimertinib * alk_fusion: interaction beta = 0.238, p=0.0172. Stratified: alk_fusion=1 (n=2464) osimertinib effect = +0.231 months; alk_fusion=0 (n=47536) effect = -0.0073. Significant positive interaction supporting benefit in ALK+ patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each treatment, screening every candidate modifier in pfs_months ~ treatment * modifier OLS reveals the strongest treatment-effect heterogeneity at the top of the list. We hypothesize that the systematic screen will surface biologically expected modifiers (kras_g12c for sotorasib, alk_fusion / egfr_mutation for osimertinib, brca2_mutation for olaparib, pdl1_tps / stk11 / smoking for pembrolizumab) at the top.
For treatment_sotorasib, sex_female is a negative effect modifier (treatment_sotorasib × sex_female has negative beta).
For treatment_osimertinib, alk_fusion is a positive effect modifier (treatment_osimertinib × alk_fusion has positive beta).

analyses.result_summary:
Systematic interaction screen across 30 candidate modifiers for each treatment.
  Pembrolizumab top-3: weight_loss_pct_6mo (beta=0.018, p=0.00032), stage_iv (beta=0.108, p=0.0068), kras_g12c (beta=-0.113, p=0.057) — no convincing modifier (smallest p ~3e-4 for weight_loss_pct_6mo, beta=+0.018).
  Sotorasib top-3: kras_g12c (beta=2.558, p=0), sex_female (beta=-0.562, p=5.3e-41), smk_never (beta=-0.361, p=6.4e-10) — kras_g12c dominant (p=0), then sex_female (negative interaction, p=5e-41), then smoking pattern.
  Olaparib top-3: bun_mg_dl (beta=0.011, p=0.014), crp_mg_l (beta=0.006, p=0.022), creatinine_mg_dl (beta=0.136, p=0.063) — no biomarker stands out; brca2_mutation is not in the top hits.
  Osimertinib top-3: alk_fusion (beta=0.238, p=0.017), brca2_mutation (beta=-0.254, p=0.05), potassium_meq_l (beta=0.056, p=0.2) — alk_fusion is the strongest positive interaction (beta=+0.238, p=0.017).
treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction beta = -0.562, p=5.3e-41. Highly significant negative interaction: sotorasib benefit is much larger in males.
treatment_osimertinib × alk_fusion interaction beta = 0.238, p=0.0172. Significant positive interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5, treatment_pembrolizumab benefit is suppressed by stk11_mutation=1 (positive treatment_pembrolizumab × stk11_mutation interaction in this subset, i.e., effect closer to zero or negative when STK11 mutated).

analyses.result_summary: In pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 (n=9149): pembro effect on PFS = -0.095 months. Direction is NEGATIVE (treated worse), not positive — hypothesis refuted.
Within pdl1_tps>=0.5 subset, treatment_pembrolizumab × stk11_mutation interaction: beta=0.169, p=0.165. Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within kras_g12c=1, treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months is reduced by stk11_mutation=1 vs stk11_mutation=0 (negative 3-way treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c × stk11_mutation term).
The treatment_sotorasib benefit is essentially confined to kras_g12c=1 patients regardless of STK11 status (+2.0 to +2.6 months in kras_g12c=1 subgroups; near zero in kras_g12c=0).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c * stk11_mutation. 3-way interaction beta=-0.271, p=0.128. Direction matches but not statistically significant.

4 strata: kras=0_stk11=0 effect=-0.007, n=37077; kras=0_stk11=1 effect=0.003, n=6555; kras=1_stk11=0 effect=+2.59, n=5472; kras=1_stk11=1 effect=+2.33, n=896. Sotorasib benefit confined to kras_g12c=1; STK11 modestly attenuates but does not abolish.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca2_mutation=1 patients, no remaining clinical or biomarker covariate (ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, nlr, crp_mg_l, stk11_mutation) modifies treatment_olaparib effect on pfs_months in a statistically significant way.

analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519), treatment_olaparib × modifier interactions: ecog_ps: beta=0.085, p=0.63, stage_iv: beta=-0.220, p=0.36, has_brain_mets: beta=-0.302, p=0.26, albumin_g_dl: beta=0.102, p=0.67, ldh_u_l: beta=-0.002, p=0.15, weight_loss_pct_6mo: beta=-0.004, p=0.9, nlr: beta=0.088, p=0.14, crp_mg_l: beta=-0.005, p=0.74, stk11_mutation: beta=0.406, p=0.24. None significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within egfr_mutation=1 patients, treatment_osimertinib has no overall effect on pfs_months (mean difference near zero in this subset), refuting expected biology.

Within egfr_mutation=1, no candidate modifier (ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, smk_never, hist_sq, stk11_mutation, tmb_high) significantly modifies treatment_osimertinib effect.

analyses.result_summary: Within egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517): treatment_osimertinib effect on pfs_months = -0.0141 months. Effectively zero, supporting hypothesis that osimertinib provides no benefit in EGFR+ subgroup in this dataset.

Within egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib × modifier interactions all p>0.05. Closest to significance: tmb_high (beta=-0.295, p=0.060) and stk11_mutation (beta=+0.263, p=0.106). No clear modifier.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0, no laboratory modifier (albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, hemoglobin_g_dl) significantly modifies treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 (n=9149): treatment_pembrolizumab × lab interactions all p>0.08; no significant lab effect modifier identified.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within kras_g12c=1, lower albumin_g_dl is associated with reduced treatment_sotorasib benefit (negative treatment_sotorasib × albumin_g_dl interaction within KRAS+ — i.e., as albumin rises, sotorasib effect diminishes).
Within kras_g12c=1, has_brain_mets=1 reduces treatment_sotorasib benefit (negative treatment_sotorasib × has_brain_mets interaction within KRAS+).

analyses.result_summary: Within kras_g12c=1 (n=6368): treatment_sotorasib × albumin_g_dl beta=-0.340, p=0.0119. Negative and nominally significant — suggests sotorasib benefit is smaller (in absolute months) at higher albumin (or larger when albumin is low). Direction is opposite of typical expectation but consistent with the OLS sign reading.
Within kras_g12c=1: treatment_sotorasib × has_brain_mets beta=-0.306, p=0.0524. Trend toward smaller benefit with brain mets, but not significant (p≈0.05).

proposed_hypotheses.text: has_brain_mets=1 has a strong negative main effect on pfs_months across the cohort.
has_brain_mets does not significantly modify treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_sotorasib, treatment_olaparib, or treatment_osimertinib effects on pfs_months overall.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ has_brain_mets: beta=-0.921, p=0. Strongly negative.
Treatment × has_brain_mets interactions: pembro beta=0.0128 (p=0.777); sotorasib beta=-0.0085 (p=0.858); olaparib beta=-0.0333 (p=0.502); osimertinib beta=0.0329 (p=0.506). All p>0.5.

proposed_hypotheses.text: sex_female negatively modifies treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months (treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction is negative — females derive less PFS benefit from sotorasib than males).
Sex does not modify treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_olaparib, or treatment_osimertinib effects on pfs_months.

Three-way: the sotorasib benefit is concentrated specifically in kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 (males); the three-way treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c × sex_female interaction is strongly negative, indicating the kras_g12c×sotorasib interaction itself is much smaller in females.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * sex_female: interaction beta=-0.562, p=5.3e-41. Highly significant negative interaction.
Sex × treatment interactions for other treatments: pembro beta=0.0201 (p=0.617); olaparib beta=0.0109 (p=0.804); osimertinib beta=-0.0224 (p=0.609). All NS.

OLS treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c * sex_female 3-way model. 3-way interaction beta=-4.688, p=0 (essentially 0). Stratified means: kras=1, male: PFS = 7.88 on sotorasib vs 3.23 off (Δ=+4.64 months, p=0); kras=1, female: 3.18 vs 3.19 (Δ=-0.01); kras=0, male: -0.02; kras=0, female: +0.01. Sotorasib benefit is essentially confined to KRAS G12C+ MALES.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 patients, treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months substantially (positive effect ≈ +2.5 months overall in the marker-positive group).
In brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib does NOT increase pfs_months (effect near zero), refuting expected efficacy.
In egfr_mutation=1 patients, treatment_osimertinib does NOT increase pfs_months (effect near zero), refuting expected efficacy.
In pdl1_tps>=0.5 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab does NOT increase pfs_months (effect near zero or slightly negative), refuting expected efficacy.

analyses.result_summary: kras_g12c=1 (n=6368): sotorasib effect = +2.552 months, t-test p=2.54e-275.
brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519): olaparib effect = 0.0104 months, t-test p=0.932. Hypothesis of no benefit supported.
egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517): osimertinib effect = -0.0141 months, t-test p=0.809. Hypothesis of no benefit supported.
pdl1_tps>=0.5 (n=10749): pembrolizumab effect = -0.070 months, t-test p=0.106. No benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Brute-force search across pairwise binary subgroups (each defined by two of {sex_female, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, egfr_mutation, kras_g12c, alk_fusion, stk11_mutation, brca2_mutation, tmb_high, hist_sq, smk_never, smk_current}) will identify the largest treatment_sotorasib effect in the joint subgroup (sex_female=0 AND kras_g12c=1).
Brute-force search will not identify any pairwise binary subgroup with a clinically meaningful (>0.5 months) and statistically significant treatment_pembrolizumab effect.
Brute-force search will not identify any pairwise binary subgroup with a clinically meaningful (>0.5 months) and statistically significant treatment_olaparib effect.
Brute-force search will identify treatment_osimertinib subgroups defined by alk_fusion=1 (combined with another modifier) at the top of the ranked list, with effects ≈ +0.25 months.

analyses.result_summary: Top sotorasib pair-subgroup: sex_female=0, kras_g12c=1 (n=3508), effect=+4.644 months, p=0. Confirms hypothesis: sex_female=0 AND kras_g12c=1 is the largest subgroup effect.
Top pembrolizumab pair-subgroup: stk11_mutation=1, brca2_mutation=1 (n=231), effect=0.324, p=0.24. None reaches both >0.5 month effect AND p<0.05; hypothesis supported.
Top olaparib pair-subgroup: stk11_mutation=1, brca2_mutation=1 (n=231), effect=0.361, p=0.273. No subgroup reaches >0.5 month effect with p<0.05; hypothesis supported.

Top osimertinib pair-subgroups: 1) kras_g12c=1, alk_fusion=1 effect=+0.665; 2) kras_g12c=1, stk11_mutation=1 effect=+0.424; 3) has_brain_mets=0, alk_fusion=1 effect=+0.287, p=0.0119. Multiple alk_fusion=1-containing pairs at the top (consistent with ALK as the modifier).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In marker-negative subgroups (kras_g12c=0, brca2_mutation=0, egfr_mutation=0, pdl1_tps<0.01), the corresponding targeted treatment provides no pfs_months benefit (all near-zero treatment effects).

analyses.result_summary: sotorasib in kras_g12c=0 (n=43632): effect=-0.0054, p=0.799. olaparib in brca2_mutation=0 (n=48481): effect=-0.0263, p=0.235. osimertinib in egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483): effect=0.0058, p=0.805. pembrolizumab in pdl1_tps<0.01 (n=5791): effect=0.0534, p=0.363. All near-zero. Hypothesis supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 AND tmb_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab (positive effect).

analyses.result_summary: pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 AND tmb_high=1 (n=2714): pembrolizumab effect = +0.056 months. Direction positive but small. Compare pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 AND tmb_high=0 (n=6435): effect=-0.156. Effects modestly differ; sample sizes preclude statistical significance.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within kras_g12c=1, treatment_sotorasib retains a positive effect on pfs_months after adjustment for stk11_mutation, tmb_high, ecog_ps, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, has_brain_mets and the treatment_sotorasib × stk11 / × tmb_high interactions; the main treatment_sotorasib coefficient remains large and significant.

analyses.result_summary: OLS within kras_g12c=1: treatment_sotorasib main beta=+2.620, p=2.64e-202. treatment_sotorasib:stk11_mutation beta=-0.318, p=0.0954. treatment_sotorasib:tmb_high beta=-0.060, p=0.661. Main sotorasib effect remains large and highly significant after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib does not show a clinically meaningful positive effect in any subgroup defined by has_brain_mets, smk_never, tmb_high, or stk11_mutation.

analyses.result_summary: Stratified osimertinib effects within egfr_mutation=1: has_brain_mets=1: Δ=0.051 (n=1635); has_brain_mets=0: Δ=-0.029 (n=4882), smk_never=1: Δ=-0.009 (n=3825); smk_never=0: Δ=-0.020 (n=2692), tmb_high=1: Δ=-0.260 (n=1075); tmb_high=0: Δ=0.035 (n=5442), stk11_mutation=1: Δ=0.209 (n=980); stk11_mutation=0: Δ=-0.054 (n=5537). No subgroup shows osimertinib benefit >0.3 months that is reproducible (e.g., stk11=1 shows +0.21, but n=980 small; tmb_high=1 shows -0.26).

proposed_hypotheses.text: When pfs_months is regressed on treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_tps + treatment_pembrolizumab × stk11_mutation, neither interaction is statistically significant; the treatment_pembrolizumab effect at pdl1_tps=0 is essentially zero, and stratifying by PDL1 quintiles shows no monotonic dose-response of pembrolizumab benefit with PDL1.

analyses.result_summary: Joint OLS: treatment_pembrolizumab main beta=0.0031 (p=0.93); × pdl1_tps beta=-0.116 (p=0.217); × stk11_mutation beta=-0.0157 (p=0.779). PDL1 quintile pembrolizumab effects within stk11=0: 0–0.05: -0.027; 0.05–0.2: 0.0003; 0.2–0.4: 0.0016; 0.4–0.6: -0.076; 0.6+: -0.098. No monotonic positive trend; pembrolizumab provides no PFS benefit at any PDL1 stratum in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months by approximately +4.6 months relative to no sotorasib in the joint subgroup defined by kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 (KRAS G12C-positive males); this benefit is essentially absent (≈0 months) in kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1 (females), confirming that female sex is the unfavorable modifier that suppresses the kras_g12c-defined sotorasib treatment effect. No benefit in kras_g12c=0 regardless of sex.

FINAL: treatment_osimertinib increases pfs_months by approximately +0.26 months in the alk_fusion=1 subgroup (with no benefit elsewhere); the expected egfr_mutation-defined benefit is absent in this dataset.

FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab does NOT meaningfully increase pfs_months in any subgroup defined by combinations of pdl1_tps, tmb_high, stk11_mutation, smoking_status, histology, or other modifiers. Best-supported hypothesis is null effect across all clinically considered subgroups.
FINAL: treatment_olaparib does NOT meaningfully increase pfs_months in any subgroup, including brca2_mutation=1; best-supported hypothesis is null effect.

analyses.result_summary: Final sotorasib subgroup: kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 (n=3508): pembrolizumab... I mean sotorasib effect = +4.644 months (PFS 7.88 on vs 3.23 off), p=0.0. In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1 (n=2860): sotorasib effect = -0.012 months (essentially null). In kras_g12c=0: effect ≈ 0 in both sexes. 3-way interaction treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c × sex_female beta=-4.69, p≈0. Benefit is concentrated in KRAS G12C+ MALES.
Final osimertinib subgroup: alk_fusion=1 (n=2464): osimertinib effect = +0.231 months, t-test p≈0.02. egfr_mutation=1: effect = -0.014, p=0.809 (null).

Final pembrolizumab: no subgroup with both clinically meaningful effect (>0.3 months) and statistical support. pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 (n=9149) effect = -0.095 months (slightly negative), p=0.044 — but DIRECTIONALLY NEGATIVE, not positive; null/harm rather than benefit. Overall: no actionable benefit subgroup.

Final olaparib: brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519) effect = +0.010 months, p=0.932. No other subgroup shows clinically meaningful significant benefit (top-3 brute search subgroups all have p>0.05). Best-supported hypothesis is null.
